action.reasoning: Observation: 25 epochs, best rmse_z500=431.29 at epoch 10, then overfitting. 7.99M params, ~112s/epoch. Took ~47min. Analysis: Model overfits after epoch 10. Need stronger regularization, lower LR, or different architecture. Ideas: 1) Use a wider model with shorter training, 2) Add weight decay/dropout, 3) Use skip connection from input (predict residual from t=current). Predicting residual (delta from last input) is a known trick for weather. Decision: Add residual prediction (model predicts difference from last input snapshot), train ~15 epochs with this, plus moderate weight decay. Also submit eval first with current best.
